Summary field for race selections. The values in Race are prioritized and sorted in the following order: HP, IN, AS, BA, WH, MU, OT, and UN for each individual. This priority is applied when more than one race is available for an individual. That means that if a member is both Black and Alaska Native, they would have 'IN' . This is the SEER standard. Same standard used in Race1 of the HCSRN VDW.
Notes: OT= Other; UN= Unknown; WH= White; HP= Hawaiian or other pacific islander; IN= Native American / Alaska native; AS= Asian; HS= Hispanic; BA= Black
